_comment: Selectors for YouTube's live_chat frame. YouTube can change this DOM at any time — this file is the ONLY place that should need editing when that happens. Ship fixes as a small selectors-pack update instead of a full app rebuild. Values are plain CSS selectors, so comma-separate a few candidate selectors per field to add fallback tolerance for markup variants — querySelector already treats a comma list as 'match any of these', no code changes needed.
author: #author-name
avatar: #author-photo img, #author-photo yt-img-shadow img, #img.yt-live-chat-author-chip img, yt-img-shadow#author-photo img, yt-live-chat-author-chip img
